A '''battle''' between the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] took place on a [[Unidentified planet (Kenobi and Skywalker)|planet]] during the early [[Standard month/Legends|months]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==The battle==
Some [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], fought against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] on a [[Unidentified planet (Kenobi and Skywalker)|planet]]. The [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] fought against the many [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|super battle droids]] on the world.<ref name="Chapter 1" />

==Behind the scenes==
The battle first appeared in the [[Chapter 1 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|first chapter]] of the ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' television series. To date, the battle, and even the planet the battle takes place on, are yet to be revealed.
